step_types.name: agent
step_types.description: Agent step executor — dispatches an LLM subprocess and validates output

step_types.name: command
step_types.description: Command step executor — runs a shell command and captures output as data (structured or text)

step_types.name: transform
step_types.description: Transform step executor — produces output by resolving expressions in a mapping (no LLM, no subprocess)

step_types.name: gate
step_types.description: Gate step executor — runs a shell command and passes/fails based on exit code

step_types.name: loop
step_types.description: Loop step executor — runs sub-steps repeatedly until a gate breaks, max attempts is reached, or a step fails

step_types.name: forEach
step_types.description: ForEach step executor — iterates over an array, executing the step body once per element with the element bound to a named variable in scope

step_types.name: parallel
step_types.description: Parallel step executors — concurrent step execution within a layer or within a single parallel step declaration

step_types.name: pause
step_types.description: Pause step executor — halts workflow execution at a deliberate checkpoint (resumable via /workflow resume or Ctrl+J)

agent_specs.name: audit-fixer
agent_specs.description: Fixes a cluster of related audit findings in source code

agent_specs.name: code-explorer
agent_specs.description: Explore a codebase path and produce a structural overview

agent_specs.name: decomposer
agent_specs.description: Decomposes investigation findings into implementation specs with parallelization decisions

agent_specs.name: investigator
agent_specs.description: Investigates a gap by reading the codebase — produces structured findings

agent_specs.name: pattern-analyzer
agent_specs.description: Analyze design patterns and return typed findings

agent_specs.name: phase-author
agent_specs.description: Converts unstructured intent from conversation into a structured phase spec with numbered specs, acceptance criteria, and success criteria

agent_specs.name: plan-decomposer
agent_specs.description: Decomposes a phase spec into focused implementation plans with context decisions

agent_specs.name: quality-analyzer
agent_specs.description: Analyze code quality and return typed findings

agent_specs.name: researcher
agent_specs.description: Researches known solutions, patterns, and heuristics relevant to a gap

agent_specs.name: spec-implementer
agent_specs.description: Implements a single plan from a phase decomposition

agent_specs.name: structure-analyzer
agent_specs.description: Analyze code structure and return typed findings

agent_specs.name: synthesizer
agent_specs.description: Synthesize typed analysis findings into a unified report

agent_specs.name: verifier
agent_specs.description: Verifies step outputs against declared intent and success criteria

schemas.name: decomposition-specs
schemas.description: Implementation specs from decomposition with dependencies and parallelization

schemas.name: execution-results
schemas.description: Agent execution results: tasks, decisions, issues, deviations, test count, commit hash

schemas.name: investigation-findings
schemas.description: Investigation findings: affected files, constraints, risks, complexity, needs_research

schemas.name: pattern-analysis
schemas.description: Pattern analysis output from codebase exploration

schemas.name: plan-breakdown
schemas.description: Plan decomposition output with plans array and parallel grouping

schemas.name: quality-analysis
schemas.description: Quality analysis output from codebase exploration

schemas.name: research-findings
schemas.description: Research findings: answers to specific technical questions with confidence ratings

schemas.name: structure-analysis
schemas.description: Structure analysis output from codebase exploration

schemas.name: synthesis
schemas.description: Synthesis of multiple analysis outputs into unified report

schemas.name: verifier-output
schemas.description: Verification result: truths, artifacts, requirements_coverage, criteria_results, gaps, human_verification

schemas.name: architecture
schemas.description: Architecture module inventory with dependencies and concerns

schemas.name: audit
schemas.description: Audit output: checks, findings with severity/location/fix, summary

schemas.name: conformance-reference
schemas.description: Conformance rules: principles, rules with check_method/patterns/severity

schemas.name: conventions
schemas.description: Project conventions: code style, testing, error handling, naming

schemas.name: decisions
schemas.description: Design decisions with rationale, alternatives, and consequences

schemas.name: gaps
schemas.description: Capability gaps, issues, cleanup items with severity and status

schemas.name: inventory
schemas.description: Project inventory: test counts, step types, agents, schemas, workflows

schemas.name: phase
schemas.description: Phase specification with numbered specs, acceptance criteria, success criteria

schemas.name: project
schemas.description: Project identity: name, purpose, scope, constraints

schemas.name: rationale
schemas.description: Design rationale: narrative explanations of architectural decisions

schemas.name: reference-contracts
schemas.description: Reference contracts for workflow system interfaces and behaviors

schemas.name: runtime-spec
schemas.description: Runtime specification: behavior definitions and requirements

schemas.name: state
schemas.description: Project state: session metadata and workflow execution state

demo_workflows.name: create-phase
demo_workflows.description: Convert unstructured intent into a structured phase spec
demo_workflows.proves: Intent → phase-author agent → structured phase spec with numbered specs and criteria

demo_workflows.name: do-gap
demo_workflows.description: Standard path from gap to implementation — investigate, research, decompose, implement, verify, route
demo_workflows.proves: Complete gap resolution pipeline with conditional research and parallel implementation

demo_workflows.name: fix-audit
demo_workflows.description: Fix audit findings grouped by related clusters
demo_workflows.proves: Audit loading → forEach cluster → audit-fixer agent → project block updates

demo_workflows.name: parallel-analysis
demo_workflows.description: Analyze a codebase from multiple angles concurrently, then synthesize findings
demo_workflows.proves: Parallel step execution → concurrent analysis → sequential synthesis

demo_workflows.name: parallel-explicit
demo_workflows.description: Demo of explicit parallel step syntax
demo_workflows.proves: Explicit parallel step declaration with concurrent execution

demo_workflows.name: pausable-analysis
demo_workflows.description: Multi-step analysis with deliberate pause point — demonstrates checkpoint/resume
demo_workflows.proves: Pause step → workflow stops → resumable from checkpoint

demo_workflows.name: resumable-analysis
demo_workflows.description: A multi-step analysis workflow that demonstrates checkpoint/resume
demo_workflows.proves: Workflow can be interrupted and resumed from last completed step

demo_workflows.name: self-implement
demo_workflows.description: Read project blocks, decompose into plans, implement, verify
demo_workflows.proves: Project blocks → template composition → plan decomposition → forEach execution → verification → typed results

demo_workflows.name: typed-analysis
demo_workflows.description: Codebase analysis with typed JSON data flow. Analyzers produce schema-bound JSON. Synthesizer renders from typed data via templates. Proves: YAML spec → template composition → typed output → template task → agent.
demo_workflows.proves: YAML spec → template composition → typed JSON output → template-rendered task prompt → agent working from structured data

templates.name: analyzers
templates.description: Pattern, quality, and structure analysis templates
